title: henckelia follicularis
intro: Henckelia follicularis, also known as the purple leafed Henckelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a type of herb commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Eastern Himalayas and Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Henckelia follicularis include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
